---
name: Agentic Web: Proposal & Feedback
about: Propose a new quality signal or provide feedback on an existing experimental audit.
title: "[Agentic Web] "
labels: ["agentic-web"]
assignees: ''

---

### Submission Type
- [ ] New Audit Proposal
- [ ] Feedback / Bug Report on Existing Audit

### Audit Name / Affected Audit
(e.g., WebMCP Validation, Token Efficiency, Semantic Structure)

### Description & Rationale
- **For Proposals**: Why is this audit important for AI agents? What problem does it solve?
- **For Feedback/Bugs**: Please describe the issue or feedback. Are there false positives/negatives?

### Target Agents
Which agentic browsers or models would benefit from this signal? (e.g., Bluedog, OpenAI Atlas, Perplexity)

### Proposed Implementation / Suggested Improvement
- **For Proposals**: How should this be measured? Describe the deterministic logic if possible.
- **For Feedback/Bugs**: How can we make this audit more useful or accurate?

### Example URL
If applicable, please provide a URL demonstrating the issue or use case.
